# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { VercelRequest } from '@vercel/node';

export const config = {
	runtime: 'edge',
};

type BodyShape = {
	content?: unknown;
	headers?: Record<string, unknown>;
	status?: number;
	flushMs?: number;
};

const isPlainObject = (v: unknown): v is Record<string, unknown> =>
	typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && (Object.getPrototypeOf(v) === Object.prototype || Object.getPrototypeOf(v) === null);

const sanitizeHeaders = (input: unknown): Headers => {
	const out = new Headers();

	if (!isPlainObject(input)) return out;

	for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(input)) {
		const key = String(k).trim();
		if (!key) continue;

		if (/[\r\n]/.test(key)) continue;
		if (key.toLowerCase() === 'set-cookie') continue;

		if (typeof v === 'string' || typeof v === 'number' || typeof v === 'boolean') {
			const val = String(v);
			if (!/[\r\n]/.test(val)) out.set(key, val);
		} else if (Array.isArray(v)) {
			for (const item of v) {
				if (typeof item === 'string' || typeof item === 'number' || typeof item === 'boolean') {
					const val = String(item);
					if (!/[\r\n]/.test(val)) out.append(key, val);
				}
			}
		}
	}

	return out;
};

const toUint8Stream = (content: unknown, flushMs = 0): ReadableStream<Uint8Array> => {
	const encoder = new TextEncoder();

	const toText = (v: unknown): string => {
		if (v === null || v === undefined) return '';
		if (typeof v === 'string') return v;
		if (typeof v === 'number' || typeof v === 'boolean' || typeof v === 'bigint') return String(v);
		try {
			return JSON.stringify(v);
		} catch {
			return String(v);
		}
	};

	if (content instanceof ReadableStream) {
		return content as ReadableStream<Uint8Array>;
	}

	if (content instanceof Uint8Array) {
		return new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
			start(controller) {
				controller.enqueue(content);
				controller.close();
			},
		});
	}

	if (Array.isArray(content)) {
		return new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
			async start(controller) {
				for (const chunk of content) {
					controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(toText(chunk)));
					if (flushMs > 0) await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, flushMs));
				}
				controller.close();
			},
		});
	}

	const text = toText(content);
	return new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
		start(controller) {
			controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(text));
			controller.close();
		},
	});
};

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
	if (req.method !== 'POST') {
		return new Response('Method Not Allowed', { status: 405 });
	}

	let body: BodyShape = {};
	try {
		body = (await req.json()) as BodyShape;
	} catch {
		return new Response('Invalid JSON body', { status: 400 });
	}

	const status = typeof body.status === 'number' ? body.status : 200;
	const flushMs = typeof body.flushMs === 'number' && body.flushMs > 0 ? body.flushMs : 0;

	const userHeaders = sanitizeHeaders(body.headers);
	if (!userHeaders.has('content-type')) userHeaders.set('content-type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8');
	userHeaders.set('cache-control', userHeaders.get('cache-control') ?? 'no-store');
	userHeaders.set('x-content-type-options', 'nosniff');

	const sourceStream = toUint8Stream(body.content, flushMs);

	const passthrough = new TransformStream<Uint8Array, Uint8Array>();
	sourceStream.pipeTo(passthrough.writable).catch(() => {});

	return new Response(passthrough.readable, {
		status,
		headers: userHeaders,
	});
}
